title: BPSC Motor Vehcile Inspector MVI 2025 Final Result
post_name: Bihar BPSC BPSC Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) in Transport Dept Recruitment 2025 Download Final Result for 28 Post

age_relaxation_notes: Read the Notification for Age Relaxation in BPSC Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) in Transport Dept., Govt. of Bihar. (Advt. No. 41/2025) Recruitment 2025.
how_to_apply: Bihar Public Service Commission BPSC Are Issued Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) in Transport Dept., Govt. of Bihar. (Advt. No. 41/2025) Recruitment Notification 2024 and Invited Online Application Form for the BPSC Bihar MVI Jobs 2025 Candidate Can Apply Online for 10/06/2025 to 03/07/2025
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the BPSC Latest Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) Recruitment Exam 2025 Application Form in Sarkari Result Recruitment Latest Job Section.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - ID, DOB Proof, Etc.
Live Photo and Hindi / English Signature Required in BPSC Form 2025.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
